name: Deep Sleep
desc: Restorative deep sleep for cell recovery and brain health.

name: Trading Info & News
desc: Analyze global indices, SGX/Gift Nifty, macro news, and plan trading levels.

name: Morning Walk / Light Stretch
desc: Light cardio walk in nature and dynamic stretching to activate muscles.

name: Pre-Workout Meal
desc: Quick digesting carbs and hydration before hitting the gym.

name: Gym & Exercise Workout
desc: Resistance training / Heavy lifting session targeting specific muscle groups.

name: Post-Gym Diet & Shower
desc: High-protein meal / whey shake, refreshing warm shower, and recovery.

name: Business Learning & Finance
desc: Learn business models, microeconomics, financial statements, or startup marketing.

name: Healthy Lunch & Rest
desc: High-fiber, high-protein balanced lunch followed by a short rest.

name: Trading Chart Analysis
desc: Practice technical charting, support/resistance, price action patterns, and backtesting.

name: Content Creation (Testing)
desc: Record 2-4 test videos, practice editing, camera presence, and script pacing.

name: New Skill Learning
desc: Interactive skill learning session. Controlled dynamically by the automation engine.

name: English Speaking & Practice
desc: Practice conversational grammar, speak in front of a mirror, read aloud, or watch English videos.

name: Park & Playing with Friends
desc: Meet friends in the park, play badminton/cricket, or walk. Social connection.

name: Healthy Dinner
desc: Light dinner with complex carbs and protein to prevent sleep disruption.

name: Entertainment & Recreation
desc: Watch a movie/show, play video games, listen to music, or relax.

name: Psychology & Philosophy Reading
desc: Read cognitive psychology, stoicism, Eastern philosophy, or human behavior studies.

name: Night Wind-down & Logging
desc: Fill the daily review log, reflect, evening meditation (15m), and turn off screens.

name: Sleep Alarm
desc: Reminder to immediately go to sleep.

name: Deep Sleep
desc: Restorative deep sleep for body recovery and memory consolidation.
